mapper.insert: insert into movmov_user_addresses ( addr_id , addr_name , addr_road , addr_detail , user_id , receiver_number , receiver_name , zipcode ) values (#{id}, #{addressName}, #{road}, #{detail}, #{user.id}, #{receiverPhone}, #{receiverName}, #{zipcode})
mapper.select:
select a.addr_id as id , a.addr_name as addressName , a.addr_road as road , a.addr_detail as detail , u.user_id as "user.id" , a.receiver_number as receiverPhone , a.receiver_name as receiverName , a.zipcode as zipcode
from movmov_users u
join movmov_user_addresses a
on u.addr_id = a.addr_id
where u.user_id = #{id}
